title: Ninette y un señor de Murcia
writer: Miguel Mihura, José María Otero, Fernando Fernán Gómez
actors: Rosenda Monteros, Fernando Fernán Gómez, Alfredo Landa
plot: Andrés Martínez Segura is a mature single man who has never left Murcia. After inheriting a bookstore and 300,000 pesetas in cash from his Aunt Eugenia, he decides to take a trip to Paris, where his friend Armando lives. Armando f...
